title: Heavy Duty Padlock - 38mm High Security Key Padlock for Doors, Sheds, Garages & Cabinets - DGSDDS-01
features: The heavy duty padlock is made of alloy material, with a hardened lock catch, the lock body is thickened, the surface is smooth, wear-resistant, and anti-fall, providing safety protection for your valuables.
Padlock Size: Total height-60mm, Shackle diameter-6mm, Lock width-38mm, Lock body thickness-16mm.
Longterm protection: High security padlock is ideal for indoor and outdoor use, Long-term protection for your property.
Widely used: Padlocks with keys great suitable for Lockers, garden sheds, cabinets, indoor and outdoor doors, warehouse, and other storage units.
Package Included: 1 pack padlock, and each padlock with 3 keys.
description: Product Description Specification: Material: Hardened Alloy Size: Padlock total length 6cm, width 3.8cm, lock beam diameter 0.6 cm, thickness 1.6 cm Weight: 109g Color: Silver Package includes: 1 padlock with 3 keys Thick lock body The key padlock lock body is thick, hard and smash-proof to protect your safety. Drain hole design There is a water outlet at the bottom of the padlock, and the water outlet can drain the accumulated water in the lock to prevent corrosion. Widely used: Padlocks with keys great suitable for Lockers, garden sheds, cabinets, indoor and outdoor doors, warehouse, and other storage units
